Market Intelligence Brief
Generated 10:06 ET
Massive put protection build despite positive gamma suggests institutional positioning for CPI volatility
KEY TAKEAWAYS
  • 1. Dealers hold $4.4B positive gamma creating a dampening regime, yet massive put blocks signal institutional hedging into today's CPI print
  • 2. Extreme put flow divergence — CSX +765%, SMPL +10,201% — driven by company-specific catalysts rather than broad defensiveness
  • 3. Low 0.11 implied correlation creates dispersion opportunity as single-name volatility trades independently from index hedging demand
NARRATIVE — CPI hedged, gamma dampened

Institutional put protection accelerated ahead of today's 8:30am CPI print, with massive SPY April put blocks totaling 91,049 contracts despite dealers holding $4.4B positive gamma that should dampen moves. The 16,709-lot builds in both 650P and 665P strikes at $1.44 and $3.66 represent classic tail hedging into a binary event, suggesting institutions expect CPI to break the current range-bound regime where gamma suppression has kept realized volatility contained. Single-name put explosions tell a different story entirely — CSX's +765% put surge follows Norfolk Southern's guidance cut yesterday, while SMPL's extraordinary +10,201% put volume coincides with management turnover rumors circulating since Monday. This divergence between systematic index hedging and idiosyncratic single-name protection is confirmed by implied correlation at just 0.11, creating the classic dispersion setup where long single-name volatility should outperform short index volatility. The technical backdrop adds urgency to positioning decisions, with 12 names including AAPL, AMZN, and ARM trading in backwardation — pricing elevated near-term risk despite the positive gamma environment. MRVL's 88.7 technical score and golden cross setup conflicts directly with the sector's vol-rich positioning, suggesting either a momentum continuation trade or an overstretched setup vulnerable to profit-taking.

Layer 1: Sentiment -13Layer 2: GEX +$4.4BLayer 3: Put blocks 91kLayer 4: IC 0.11Layer 9: CPI today
